name: NAFLD - Comprehensive Provider Query (DX + Labs)
description: Simulates a hepatologist identifying their complete NAFLD patient population. Combines: NAFLD diagnosis codes (multi-stage) and elevated liver enzymes. NAFLD has no specific medication (lifestyle is the mainstay), so no meds path.
prompt:
I need to identify my complete non-alcoholic fatty liver disease patient population for a quality improvement initiative on lifestyle counseling and surveillance. From clinical experience, NAFLD patients are documented in different ways: most have a formal NAFLD diagnosis (steatosis, MASH/NASH, MASLD, steatohepatitis, or cirrhosis), and most have elevated liver enzymes (ALT or AST > 40 IU/L) on routine labs.

Please run multiple FHIR queries to capture the full population:
1. Patients with any NAFLD diagnosis
2. Patients with elevated ALT or AST (>40 IU/L)

For each query, return the matching resources. I want the union of all patients found.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Union of NAFLD dx + elevated liver enzymes. Tests Condition + Observation cross-resource union for liver disease.
